description: Install dependencies and verify baseline tests pass before making changes.
steps: Run pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' to install the project in editable mode with all extras
Run pytest -q to confirm all 313+ existing tests pass on the current branch
acceptance_criteria: pytest -q passes all tests with 0 failures
findings: pip install succeeded (all deps already satisfied). pytest ran 313 tests, all passed in ~1.9s. Python 3.9 environment. No issues detected.
